aiassistant-desc: AI-powered search and chat assistant for MediaWiki
aiassistant-pageacl-denied: You do not have access to this page under the test read rules.
aiadmin-doc-capabilities-note: This block shows the current processing modes by format group. Detailed MIME rules are editable in the table below.
aiadmin-doc-cap-office-description: Text and metadata are extracted from office XML packages and added to the index.
aiadmin-doc-cap-archive-description: Archives are indexed as metadata-only; archive contents are not unpacked.
aiadmin-doc-cap-media-description: Media files are indexed as metadata-only; speech-to-text is not performed.
aiadmin-doc-cap-base-description: PDF and text files are indexed as text; images use OCR with configured languages.
aiadmin-chat-retention-note: Chat profiles control which history is sent to the prompt and retrieval. Retention below controls archiving, limits, and exports.
aiadmin-trust-note: Preview and trust recalculation run without LLM/OpenAI. Dry run does not write payload; disable it only to write trust_score/trust_flags into Qdrant.
aiadmin-semantics-note: This check reads semantic_facts from Qdrant and searches properties without calling LLM/OpenAI.
aiadmin-autofill-note: Autofill runs from the edit webhook after a page is saved. A field changed manually by a user moves to manual mode only for that page and property.
aiadmin-management-note: Reindex starts through Syncer. OpenAI-compatible embeddings and LLM enrichment are used only when selected in settings; attachments are disabled unless the Attachments flag is checked. Backup and vector purge are still disabled.
aiadmin-confirm-delete-ontology: Remove property "{name}" ({id}) from WikiAI management? This does not delete the property from MediaWiki pages. The property will stop being requested for new webhook/reindex runs; old chunks are cleaned after page reindexing.
aiadmin-empty-no-sensitive-properties: No ontology properties are configured. Add an SMW property in the Ontology vectors tab first.
aiadmin-error-save-ontology-first: Save the selected SMW property in the WikiAI ontology registry first.
aiadmin-error-smw-properties-route: SMW properties endpoint is unavailable: {error}. Update or restart Gateway on port 3000.
aiadmin-error-select-smw-property: Choose an existing SMW property from the list.
aiadmin-error-opensearch-profile-missing: No indexing profile contains target OpenSearch. Open the Indexing tab and enable target OpenSearch.
aiadmin-error-oidc-group-mappings-json: OIDC group mappings must be a JSON object like {"raw-idp-group": ["mediawiki-group"]}.
aiadmin-error-request-timeout: Request did not answer within {seconds} sec.
aiadmin-value-chat-prompt-active-session: Active sessions of the same user
aiadmin-value-chat-retrieval-current-ses: Current query + previous questions and answers
aiadmin-help-category-exclude-filter: Categories that exclude a page from this profile. Matching is exact; exclude wins over include.
aiadmin-help-category-include-filter: Choose MediaWiki categories to index pages from. A page category is written as [[Category:Name]].
aiadmin-help-indexing-profiles: A profile describes index content: namespaces, categories, filters, chunking, targets, and defaults.
aiadmin-help-indexing-automation: Assign which profile applies to page changes and which profile runs on a schedule. Manual runs choose a profile separately.
aiadmin-help-indexing-profile-editor: Edit only index content rules here. Profile execution is controlled by automation or manual run.
aiadmin-help-indexing-manual-run: One-off runs use the selected profile and can temporarily override dry run, attachments, page limit, and LLM enrichment.
aiadmin-help-debug-chain: Debug a single user request across the full answer path: retrieval profile, retrieval, ACL/trust, rerank, context, conflict detection, final prompt, and LLM request.
aiadmin-help-conflict-detection: Conflict detection makes one extra LLM request before the chat answer: it compares already ACL/trust-approved sources, finds incompatible claims, and shows the user a warning when answer trust is low. On the test stand this can trigger a paid OpenAI-compatible request; use risk only or manual to reduce cost.
aiadmin-help-conflict-system-prompt: Fallback instruction for the LLM conflict detector. It is used when the selected retrieval profile has no conflict prompt override.
aiadmin-help-answer-system-prompt-overri: Optional system prompt for chat answers with this retrieval profile. Empty value uses the LLM fallback prompt.
aiadmin-help-conflict-system-prompt-over: Optional system prompt for the conflict detector when this retrieval profile is used. Empty value uses the trust fallback prompt.
aiadmin-help-chat-prompt-owner: Chat profiles control only prompt and retrieval history. Answer and conflict detector prompts are configured in retrieval profiles; LLM and Trust Model settings remain fallbacks.
aiadmin-help-ontology-actions: Table rows are clickable: select a row, then use the buttons below the form to save, delete, generate a vector, or find similar properties.
aiadmin-help-ontology-selected: The selected row is highlighted; the line below the table shows which property the lower buttons will affect.
aiadmin-help-property-value-manual: Choose the ontology property name and type the value manually after =.
aiadmin-help-reindex-max-pages: Use the page limit for trial runs. Empty means: index every page that matches the profile, namespace, and filters.
aiadmin-help-reindex-llm-enrichment: LLM enrichment is off by default. When enabled, reindex makes up to one paid LLM request per page, adds a compact AI summary/keywords to the index, and builds embeddings for chunks separately.
aiadmin-help-sensitive-properties: Processing exclusions are flags on already managed ontology properties. Administrators decide which properties to exclude and why. The checkbox does not change MediaWiki rights, delete the SMW property, or remove values from pages. It excludes known property values from ontology vector source text and prevents fragment classification from using the property unless explicitly included. Adding SMW properties, indexing, AI prompt hint, threshold, and vector generation are configured in the Ontology vectors tab.
aiadmin-help-hybrid-search: Hybrid mixes Qdrant semantic search and BM25 keyword search from the user's query. AI is used at the embeddings step: the model turns the query and chunks into numeric vectors, while Qdrant only calculates numeric similarity. The minimum matched BM25 terms setting drops overly broad one-word matches. The BM25 gate keeps semantic-only neighbours out when keyword matches exist. Vector-only fallback is used only when BM25 finds nothing.
aiadmin-help-lexical-experimental: Experimental features work on top of the BM25 query. The base path is the simple ending heuristic. Synonyms, Latin/Cyrillic expansion, and typo tolerance do not change indexes. Trigram uses a separate index and needs backfill for old chunks. Soundex/rsoundex is not used.
aiadmin-help-namespace-chunking-override: Overrides apply only to wiki pages in the selected namespace. Empty rows are ignored.
aiadmin-help-source-aware-chunking: Different sources are split with different sizes: wiki pages, recognized attachments, attachment metadata, and dynamic snapshots. Changing this requires reindex.
aiadmin-help-opensearch-base-url: For docker-compose use http://opensearch:9200. Host URL http://127.0.0.1:9200 is only for checks outside the gateway container.
aiadmin-help-opensearch-enabled: This is backend infrastructure readiness. Retrieval profiles decide whether OpenSearch is used for search.
aiadmin-help-opensearch-effective: Effective values are resolved by Gateway: saved admin override first, then env/defaults from deployment.
aiadmin-help-opensearch-analyzer: Used by Gateway for title/text mapping and query/analyze; changing it requires index rebuild/recreate for full effect.
aiadmin-help-opensearch-fuzzy: Adds fuzzy multi_match query for typo-tolerant lexical candidates.
aiadmin-help-opensearch-highlight: Requests title/text highlights from OpenSearch for diagnostics and preview.
aiadmin-help-opensearch-boosts: Query-time field weights: title boost raises title matches; text boost raises body matches.
aiadmin-help-opensearch-candidate-limit: Maximum lexical candidates returned from OpenSearch before hybrid scoring and ACL filters.
aiadmin-help-lexical-backend: Selects the lexical backend for hybrid search. OpenSearch also requires enabled service config and an indexing profile with target OpenSearch.
aiadmin-help-colbert-index: The ColBERT index is a separate on-prem late-interaction index: each chunk is stored as token-level vectors in Qdrant, and the query is compared against them with MaxSim. In ColBERT full mode, the first search runs against this index. In Hybrid + ColBERT mode, current Qdrant/BM25 search finds candidates first and ColBERT reorders them. In both modes, Gateway still applies MediaWiki ACL and the trust model before returning results. The default antoinelouis/colbert-xm model runs locally and does not call OpenAI.
aiadmin-help-colbert-rerank: ColBERTv2 is an extra ordering check for already found chunks. The current hybrid search finds candidates first, then MediaWiki ACL and the trust model remove inaccessible or low-trust sources, and only then ColBERT receives allowed chunks and reorders them by relevance. When disabled, search works as before. This does not replace Postgres, Qdrant, BM25, or access rights.
aiadmin-help-oidc-group-mappings: JSON object: key is a raw OIDC/AD group from the token groups claim, value is a list of MediaWiki ACL groups already used in indexed allowed_groups.
aiadmin-help-oidc-group-preview: Enter raw OIDC groups separated by newline or semicolon. Do not use comma as a separator: AD DN group names contain commas. Preview is calculated locally and does not save settings.
aiadmin-help-trust-rule-condition: For namespace, title, category, tag, author_group, and template, choose values from MediaWiki dictionaries. For property, status, and date_property, choose a property name from SMW ontology; values are suggested from indexed semantic_facts, with manual input as fallback.
aiadmin-help-trust-rule-flags: Flags are result labels added by this rule. They are written to trust_flags and explain why a source was selected or restricted.
aiadmin-help-trust-entities: Each row is a standalone trust rule: what to check on a wiki page, how to change score, which flags to add, and whether restrictions are needed. Legacy factors are shown as "Legacy factor" rows; saving them converts them into normal rules.
aiadmin-help-trust-preview: Preview calculates score with the active model and sample page metadata. It does not call LLM/OpenAI. Categories, tags, author groups, and templates are added as chip lists from MediaWiki dictionaries.
aiadmin-help-trust-recalc: Recalculation writes only trust fields into Qdrant and does not call embeddings/LLM. Dry run shows the result without writing.
aiadmin-help-trust-rules: Rules change score, flags, or decisions for matching pages.
aiadmin-help-title-exclude-filter: Comma-separated title fragments. A page is skipped when its title contains one of them.
aiadmin-help-title-include-filter: Comma-separated title fragments. When filled, only pages containing at least one fragment are indexed.
aiadmin-placeholder-document-fragment: Paste a document fragment for classification
aiadmin-placeholder-select-category: choose a category from the list
aiadmin-placeholder-select-smw-property: choose an SMW property from the list
aiadmin-status-attachment-index: Attachment index: chunks {chunks}; pages {pages}; schema ready {schema}
aiadmin-status-opensearch-attachments-em: No attachment documents are indexed in OpenSearch.
aiadmin-status-attachment-index-mismatch: recognized, but missing or incomplete in OpenSearch
aiadmin-status-reindex-profile-missing: Select an indexing profile before reindex.
aiadmin-reindex-preflight: Preflight: profile {profile}; attachments requested {requested}; expected active {active}; policy {policy}; target attachments {target}; dry-run {dryRun}; targets {targets}; search targets {searchTargets}
aiadmin-reindex-status-line: Reindex: {state}; profile {profile}; namespaces {namespaces}; matched pages {matched}; limit {limit}; queued {total}; processed pages {processed}; skipped {skipped}; failed {failed}; RAG chunks {chunks}; dry-run {dryRun}
aiadmin-reindex-attachment-counters: Attachments in this run: requested {requested}; active {active}; policy {policy}; found {found}; processed {processed}; skipped {skipped}; failed {failed}
aiadmin-warning-index-profile-attachment: Attachment target and profile attachment checkbox are out of sync
aiadmin-warning-reindex-attachments-poli: Attachments were requested for this run, but document recognition policy is disabled.
aiadmin-reindex-paid-counters: AI calls: embeddings {embeddings}; LLM enrichment {enrichment}; estimated paid calls {estimated}
aiadmin-status-ontology-no-selection: No property selected. Click a table row or add a new property.
aiadmin-status-ontology-selected: Selected: {property}; type: {type}; vector: {vector}. Actions use the buttons below the form.
aiadmin-status-ontology-derived: SMW type: {type}; processing exclusion: {sensitive}. ID and label are derived automatically.
aiadmin-status-smw-properties-loaded: Loaded SMW properties: {count}; search: {search}; more available: {more}
aiadmin-status-bm25-index: BM25 index: pages {pages}; chunks {chunks}; FTS chunks {ftsChunks}; updated {latest}; backfill needed: {backfill}
aiadmin-status-trigram-index: Trigram index: chunks {chunks}; FTS chunks {ftsChunks}; backfill needed: {backfill}
aiadmin-status-trigram-job-empty: Trigram job has not run yet
aiadmin-status-mediawiki-profile-missing: Selected knowledge source profile was not found
aiadmin-status-mediawiki-opensearch-prof: OpenSearch retrieval profiles are not loaded. Restore profile examples or refresh Gateway defaults.
aiadmin-status-external-api-capabilities: Search: {search}; chat: {chat}; MCP: {mcp}; auth: {auth}; max top-k: {topK}; ACL: {acl}; mapping: {mappingMode}; rules: {mappingRules}; MW groups: {mappedGroups}. {warnings}
aiadmin-status-oidc-group-mapping-empty: groups_only + mapped_only requires explicit OIDC to MediaWiki ACL group mappings; protected chunks will be denied without them.
aiadmin-status-oidc-group-preview: Raw groups: {raw}; effective MW ACL groups: {mapped}
aiadmin-status-mediawiki-webhook-match: MediaWiki webhook URL matches Syncer URL
aiadmin-status-mediawiki-webhook-mismatc: MediaWiki webhook URL differs: LocalSettings.php uses {url}
aiadmin-status-retention-effective: Effective Redis TTL: {ttl} seconds; active: {active}; archived: {archived}; exports: {exports}
aiadmin-section-external-group-mapping: OIDC group mapping to MediaWiki ACL
aiadmin-value-group-mapping-passthrough: Raw OIDC groups + mapped MediaWiki groups
aiadmin-value-lexical-normalization-raw-: Raw prefix: do not strip endings
aiadmin-chat-profile-description-chat_cu: The prompt uses the current session; retrieval searches only the current question.
aiadmin-chat-profile-description-chat_fo: The prompt uses the current session; retrieval adds recent user questions.
The prompt uses the current session; retrieval adds recent user questions and assistant answers.
aiadmin-chat-profile-description-chat_ac: Experimental: the prompt can include active sessions of the same user; retrieval still uses the current question only.
